form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last campaign raced on the pace before fading ran last of 13 at Belmont Park Mdn on October 22 over 1200m, slow going 24 len behind Ourgirlcanrun carrying 55kg at $151. First up last campaign 9th of 11 at Dongara Mdn on April 19 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Cozzies Choice carrying 54.5kg at $16. Ran 3rd in a Lark Hill trial over 950m on March 9. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign seventh of 10 at this track November 9 over 1200m, 4 len behind Grey Revolution carrying 54kg at $5.50.
